what: Probe β piece 3d — automorphism-prescribed (cyclic+affine) construction; the witnesses' structural lever
headline: VALIDATES the structural thesis: A(14,6,6) cyclic-orbit search reached 42 = best_known in 0.0s, where unstructured search plateaued (CP-SAT 30, local-search 25). Structure IS the lever.
reading: Cyclic/affine orbit search MATCHES records where Brouwer's construction shares that symmetry (A(14,6,6)) and falls below where the record uses a different structure (quasi-cyclic / other group / non-group). 0 beats yet — but the orbit search is ~INSTANT (0.0s/cell after the orbit collapse), so the real autonomous engine is a BROAD SWEEP: many prescribed groups (cyclic, affine, all cyclic subgroups, quasi-cyclic block groups) x many open cells, taking best-over-groups, hunting a cell where the best prescribed-group code exceeds Brouwer's lower bound. This is the most promising autonomous result of the arc: cheap + sound + reaches where exact/heuristic search cannot.
trust: prescribed-group code is a fully valid code (verify_cwc); a beat would be Lean-checked (witness IS the proof). Untrusted search; trust boundary untouched.
